title: RelationshipInfoType
text: RelationshipInfoType List of RelationshipType structures describing all relations belonging to the current entity. Description The relations of a table are described in two lists of relationship structures. These lists are available through the RelationshipInfoType . Connectors can access the RelationshipInfoType structure by means of the address available in uctrl->umisc in the Open mode 4, 5 and 6. Table 1. Elements Type Element Description RelationshipType *OneRelationshipList An array of RelationshipType structures describing the relationships in which the table described by the current control block has the ‘one’ role. int OneRelationships Number of elements in the OneRelationshipList . RelationshipType *ManyRelationshipList An array of RelationshipType structures describing the relationships in which the table described by the current control block has the ‘many’ role. int ManyRelationships Number of elements in the ManyRelationshipList .
